evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday Evening Food Pantry Shift Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the earliest qualifying weekday evening food pantry volunteer shift next month within 5 miles of ZIP 30301, and whether they used the expected contact details.

evaluators.name: Free In-Person Financial Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the earliest qualifying free in-person financial workshop at the Downtown Campus on a Saturday morning this month, for one attendee using the expected details.

evaluators.name: One-Time Split Donation with Card Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user made a successful one-time donation using a credit/debit card, split between at least two different active funds, ideally exactly two.

evaluators.name: Three-Campus Evening Outreach Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added three different evening outreach events at three different campuses within the next 60 days to their outreach plan and then viewed the plan.

evaluators.name: Food Pantry Info Request via Contact Form Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user found a qualifying Wednesday food pantry with fresh produce, used its phone number in the contact form message, and requested more information about that location.

evaluators.name: Weekly 18–35 Devotional Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user subscribed to weekly devotionals for the 18–35 age group with only the Community service and Spiritual growth topics, preferring text-only emails.

evaluators.name: Private Family & Relationships Prayer Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a private (pastoral team only) prayer request in the Family & Relationships category, scheduled for the next upcoming Sunday.

evaluators.name: Earliest Light-Activity Neighborhood Cleanup RSVP Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user RSVPed to the earliest qualifying neighborhood cleanup next month (Saturday morning, light activity, within 10 miles of ZIP 44101) and indicated bringing two guests.
